name: Creakers Frontend
description: A beautiful and responsive React frontend for ordering premium fireworks and crackers for Diwali celebrations
features: Diwali-themed UI with red and gold color scheme
Quick enquiry form with product selection

components.Header: Navigation with logo, menu, and WhatsApp link
components.Home: Hero section, offers, how-to-order steps, safety tips
components.QuickEnquiry: Complete order form with product selection
components.Footer: Contact info, social links, quick navigation

pages.Home: Landing page with hero and product guides
